description.en: Sell your shares in a prediction market on Polymarket. Exchange your position shares for USDC using the CLOB API.
description.de: Verkaufe deine Anteile in einem Prognosemarkt auf Polymarket. Tausche deine Positionsanteile gegen USDC über die CLOB-API.
description.es: Sell your shares in a prediction market on Polymarket. Exchange your position shares for USDC using the CLOB API.
description.fr: Sell your shares in a prediction market on Polymarket. Exchange your position shares for USDC using the CLOB API.
description.ro: Sell your shares in a prediction market on Polymarket. Exchange your position shares for USDC using the CLOB API.
description.it: Sell your shares in a prediction market on Polymarket. Exchange your position shares for USDC using the CLOB API.

vars.API_KEY: env:POLYMARKET_API_KEY|Get your API key from Polymarket at https://polymarket.com/settings/api

description.en: The ID of the market to sell shares from.
description.de: Die ID des Marktes, von dem Anteile verkauft werden sollen.
description.es: The ID of the market to sell shares from.
description.fr: The ID of the market to sell shares from.
description.ro: The ID of the market to sell shares from.
description.it: The ID of the market to sell shares from.

description.en: Which outcome shares to sell ('YES' or 'NO').
description.de: Welche Ergebnisanteile verkauft werden sollen ('YES' oder 'NO').
description.es: Which outcome shares to sell ('YES' or 'NO').
description.fr: Which outcome shares to sell ('YES' or 'NO').
description.ro: Which outcome shares to sell ('YES' or 'NO').
description.it: Which outcome shares to sell ('YES' or 'NO').
